mapper.insert: INSERT INTO habit_questionnaire (student_id, sleep_time, wake_up_time, smoking, drinking, noise_tolerance, cleanliness, note, create_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{sleepTime}, #{wakeUpTime}, #{smoking}, #{drinking}, #{noiseTolerance}, #{cleanliness}, #{note}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE habit_questionnaire SET student_id = #{studentId}, sleep_time = #{sleepTime}, wake_up_time = #{wakeUpTime}, smoking = #{smoking}, drinking = #{drinking}, noise_tolerance = #{noiseTolerance}, cleanliness = #{cleanliness}, note = #{note}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student s LEFT JOIN habit_questionnaire hq ON s.id = hq.student_id WHERE hq.id IS NULL
SELECT hq.*, s.name AS student_name FROM habit_questionnaire hq LEFT JOIN student s ON hq.student_id = s.id ORDER BY hq.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
